TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Raga' ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 10 buwan, 31 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 100% kyan ku 31 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 0% kyan ku hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 94%, binah lihuyan s'uli 6%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Raga' hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Raga' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Raga' hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Raga' hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Raga' hya' ga Khpan. tay mkyahu' na Raga' hya' ga Sbunaw. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč ra…£a Ē …£a nija mki s~…ēku toweŇč s~…ēi atu ńßos~…ēiŇč ku, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a ***% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na ra…£a Ē ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēzil na ra…£a Ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na ra…£a Ē ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na ra…£a Ē ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na ra…£a Ē ńßja Ē …£a kńßpan. taj mkjańßu Ē na ra…£a Ē ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēő≤unaw. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Raga' ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 10 buwan, 31 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 100% kyan ku 31 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 0% kyan ku hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 94%, binah lihuyan s'uli 6%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Raga' hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Raga' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Raga' hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Raga' hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Raga' hya' ga Khpan. tay mkyahu' na Raga' hya' ga Sbunaw. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč ra…£a Ē …£a nija mki s~…ēku toweŇč s~…ēi atu ńßos~…ēiŇč ku, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a ***% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na ra…£a Ē ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēzil na ra…£a Ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na ra…£a Ē ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na ra…£a Ē ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na ra…£a Ē ńßja Ē …£a kńßpan. taj mkjańßu Ē na ra…£a Ē ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēő≤unaw. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
